articles.headline: Rice hails England's 'frightening' attacking substitutes
articles.description: Declan Rice reacts to England's 3-0 win over Costa Rica in their final friendly ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

images.name: Rice hails England's 'frightening' attacking substitutes
images.caption: Declan Rice reacts to England's 3-0 win over Costa Rica in their final friendly ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

articles.headline: England sign off WC prep with 3-0 win as Rice, Gordon, Watkins score
articles.description: Returning Declan Rice set England on course for a morale-boosting 3-0 victory against Costa Rica after a heavy thunderstorm in Orlando delayed their final World Cup warmup match by an hour.

images.name: Declan Rice [1296x729]
images.caption: Declan Rice opened the scoring for England shortly after 10 minutes played.

images.name: Tuchel: England can't be World Cup favourites
images.caption: Thomas Tuchel says England can't be favourites because there are "proven winners" at the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

articles.headline: Burley questions if Portugal's Martinez would drop Ronaldo
articles.description: Craig Burley debates whether Roberto Martinez should drop Cristiano Ronaldo amid growing scrutiny over his place in Portugal's starting lineup.

images.name: Burley questions if Portugal's Martinez would drop Ronaldo
images.caption: Craig Burley debates whether Roberto Martinez should drop Cristiano Ronaldo amid growing scrutiny over his place in Portugal's starting lineup.

articles.headline: Argentina wins as Messi scores in cameo in front of 88k in Alabama
articles.description: Argentine legend Messi, who is working his way back from muscle fatigue ahead of the start of the FIFA World Cup, came on in the 70th minute and scored from the penalty spot right after in his team's 3-0 win over Iceland.

images.name: Messi celeb Arg Iceland_260609 [1296x729]
images.caption: Lionel Messi celebrates after scoring a goal for Argentina in a friendly against Iceland.
images.alt: Lionel Messi celebrates after scoring a goal for Argentina in a friendly against Iceland.

images.name: Lionel Messi doubles Argentina's lead from the penalty spot
images.caption: Lionel Messi doubles Argentina's lead from the penalty spot

article.headline: Mexico cruise past Guatemala to claim comfortable 2-0 win
article.description: Mexico secured a 2-0 victory over Guatemala at Estadio de Mazatlan in an international friendly on Wednesday.
article.linkText: Mexico cruise past Guatemala with 2-0 victory

images.name: Mexico celeb vs Guatemala  [1296x729]
images.caption: Roberto de la Rosa of Mexico celebrates with Kevin Alvarez as Mexico win friendly over Guatemala.

peers.name: Mexico celeb vs Guatemala  [1296x1296]
peers.caption: Roberto de la Rosa of Mexico celebrates with Kevin Alvarez as Mexico win friendly over Guatemala.

peers.name: Mexico celeb vs Guatemala  [1296x729]
peers.caption: Roberto de la Rosa of Mexico celebrates with Kevin Alvarez as Mexico win friendly over Guatemala.

peers.name: Mexico celeb vs Guatemala  [1296x864]
peers.caption: Roberto de la Rosa of Mexico celebrates with Kevin Alvarez as Mexico win friendly over Guatemala.

peers.name: Mexico celeb vs Guatemala  [1296x518]
peers.caption: Roberto de la Rosa of Mexico celebrates with Kevin Alvarez as Mexico win friendly over Guatemala.

article.story:
Mexico secured a 2-0 victory over Guatemala at Estadio de Mazatlan in an international friendly on Wednesday.

Raul Jimenez and Roberto de la Rosa scored in each half as Mexico eased to a comfortable win at home.

- Stream on ESPN+: LaLiga, Bundesliga, more (U.S.)

The hosts were awarded a penalty after 14 minutes when Nicolas Samayoa was adjudged to have handled the ball inside the area.

Wolves striker Jimenez scored from the spot and with 10 minutes remaining, De la Rosa wrapped up the win for Mexico with another goal.

Diego Cocca's side face another friendly against Cameroon on Sunday before meeting the United States in the Concacaf Nations League next week.

keyEvents.text: Goal!  Mexico 1, Guatemala 0. Raúl Jiménez (Mexico) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the centre of the goal.
Substitution, Mexico. Antonio Rodríguez replaces Luis Malagón.
Substitution, Mexico. Luis Chávez replaces Roberto Alvarado.
Substitution, Mexico. Uriel Antuna replaces Carlos Rodríguez.

Substitution, Guatemala. Jorge Aparicio replaces Antonio López.
Substitution, Guatemala. Marlon Sequén replaces Óscar Castellanos.
Substitution, Mexico. Salvador Reyes replaces Ozziel Herrera.
Substitution, Mexico. Roberto de la Rosa replaces Raúl Jiménez.
Substitution, Mexico. Gilberto Sepúlveda replaces Israel Reyes.
Substitution, Guatemala. Stheven Robles replaces Carlos Mejía.
Substitution, Guatemala. Pedro Altán replaces Alejandro Galindo.
Goal!  Mexico 2, Guatemala 0. Roberto de la Rosa (Mexico) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal.
Substitution, Guatemala. Jose Franco replaces Esteban García.
